description: I Have been in Civil Construction for more than 20 years and have been using Candy for about 15 ears. I use it every day not only for tender estimating but also for cash flows and much more. It is a great product, with great support.
author: Coert E.
pros: Candy is by far the most user friendly program I have worked with and updates are done very often. I will never use another program for estimating tenders. You can structure it according to your needs and use your own experience to define your pricing.
cons: I can not say anything negative about Candy, I almost want to call it perfect.

review_title: RIB Candy - One of the best software to use for Construction cost tracking
description: My overall experience has been good. I think it is very compatible with windows, allowas for easy importation and exportation of excel bill of quantities documents. Once measures have been linked to an item it updates automatically as you add or subtract. Allows for comprehensive comparisons of original vs. actual quantities. Payment certificates are easy to create and share. Very good integration with BuildSmart
author: Andre D.
pros: Fairly easy to understand and use, even if you are used to software such as DimensionX. Easy importation/exportation of Excel BOQ.
cons: Sometimes while using a tool the curser seems to jump to other areas of the screen not being used. No shortcut key to quickly select the same tool being used.

description: good experience so far even people who have not used candy before. Highly recommended for everyone. Really nice.
author: Sumitha V.
pros: step by step description is good to understand even for people who have not used candy before. Thats good.
cons: No clear description available on how to fix import/export disparities between candy and MPP or P6 files.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: good enough. there's better software out there very time consuming to integrate estimate with client schedule and program compared to other programs. adding resources could be a lot easier.
author: Matthew T.
pros: relatively little bloat and low resource usage . quite quick to rearrange and calculate estimate price code system makes it easy to populate a high level estimate
cons: ~ Cannot link clients schedule to estimate ~ Usability significantly hampered when in Mult-user mode ~ Lacks tracking functions for changes to resources and costs ~ Program information must be manually typed in to the planning module ~ Access control by file path and user level only

review_title: How CCS Candy can improve profitability of Small to Medium Construction Companies in South Africa.
description: So far RIB CCS Candy has improved the company profitability and improved our accuracy in terms of prices and quantity take off. This has really made a difference in the retention of tenders.
author: Jonathan H.
pros: It makes my pricing simple, cheap and faster. The fact that I can copy prices from previous jobs make it easy even for comparison. I can manage subcontractors, material and even update my schedule and link them for ease of managing my projects.
cons: The fact that it has not integrated AI into the pricing or quantity take off leaves RIB Candy behind other construction software.

review_title: RIB Candy - Full Construction Industry Package form A-Z
description: I will always promote this software because a company use this software from tender, procurement, measuring, planning, estimating, cost control - full packages within a company. Full package for Construction Management from Initiating, Planning, Executing, Monitor & Control to Project Close out. Also able to determine historic information w.r.t. Planning durations (actuals vs planning)
author: Leana F.
pros: I use RIB Candy for planning purposes. The software is user friendly and assistance is an email or phone call away - excellent customer support - that I've never experienced with other software. A lot of information are also available on the website w.r.t. webinars and helps a lot.
cons: I don't have anything to complain about RIB Candy. This software support the construction industry more than 100%

review_title: I love Candy and could not work without it
description: I love Candy and could not work without it. The Customer support is second to none and on hand 24 hours a day which is great if you have a issue which needs resolving instantly.
author: Neil B.
pros: I have been using Candy for around 20 years and couldnt be without it. I love the fact that you can link the programme to the BoQ which then opens up a whole feast of extremely useful data and forecasting information. Customer Support is always on hand if you need any help or ideas on how to achieve what you require
cons: Pricing a 1st principles work activity from scratch can take time depending on how complex the activity is.

description: “My duties and responsibilities include coordinating project tasks, preparing BOQs, updating documentation, and ensuring smooth workflow support.”
author: ABDUL SAMAD MOHAMED RAFEEQ A.
pros: “Easy Trading the offers simple packages with clear pricing for quick, hassle‑free investment access.”
cons: “Updating the addendum BOQ and aligning all line items has become increasingly difficult, and the process is now taking significantly more time.”

description: It's still a best system with a few tweaks required to meet the latest technology the package will still be the leading industry's preferred.
author: Siyabonga H.
pros: The integrated package of contracts management. Reporting and tracking are standout strengths – it’s easy to see the information you actually need, and the system feels stable and reliable day to day. Overall, RIB Candy has helped streamline our processes, reduce manual effort, and improve accuracy, which makes a noticeable difference to productivity and confidence in the data we’re working with.
cons: Some functions feel a bit clunky and not as intuitive as they could be, and a few tasks take more clicks than expected. There’s also a bit of a learning curve at the start, and occasional slowdowns when working with larger data sets. In addition, the package doesn’t currently make use of artificial intelligence or smart automation, which could really help streamline repetitive work and provide more intelligent insights.

review_title: Great program with some improvement ideas
description: Very Good - great product. the price is good for what we get - we are keen on a training, but we only have 2 people in our office so not too feasible.
author: Etienne D.
pros: Its a very safe estimating product, provides a thorough breakdown of margin, , labour and material, would have been nice if there can be a master library on all rejects.
cons: Some minor bugs - but working around them, keen to have some feedback on improvements ideas - sorting the projects alphabetically as default,

review_title: “Great support and efficient tool, but room for stability improvement”
description: Overall, my experience with RIB Candy has been very positive. The tool is user-friendly, reliable, and offers excellent support. It helps save time, improve productivity, and provides everything needed in one platform.
author: Amr M.
pros: I liked their quick support and response. The application looks simple, but it does a lot of great things in a short time. All the add-ins are available inside the app itself, so there is no need to go further. Installation and product updates are also very simple
cons: Sometimes it crashes when opening multiple projects at the same time. also the user ionterface look alittle bit old and need more graphics to make it easty to use

description: Great experience that helped me and my company win tenders, have control on the cost, and get proper reporting to the management.
author: Nawras A.
pros: This software is a must for every estimator who seeks accuracy, control, ability to analyse, cost control, quantity take off, and many many other essential features.
cons: I have not encountered serious issues, the support team in the UAE is excellent and professional enough to solve any issue.

review_title: RIB Candy - The Total Construction Management Package
description: I am very happy and impressed with RIB Candy, once I understand the full functionality of RIB Candy it will make Day to Day management so much simpler.
author: Victor P.
pros: The Intergration of all the functions available through RIB Candy makes managing multiple Projects easier for all users.
cons: It takes time setting up all functions to meet up with your companies identity and the way that it functions, but nothing comes easy. Once it starts functioning everything is a breeze.

review_title: The app that gave me less stress
description: It is fantastic. the implementation of this tool has made several facets of my job easier and i am very excited to keep using it in the future
author: Yvette W.
pros: Candy is a useful tool that makes the management and tracking of progress a far more simple process. The use of this resource has proved invaluable to our organization. The ability to manage drawings effectively is another big plus regarding the software. It has allowed us to work collaboratively with engineers, architects and the like. With the built in auto save function, i know that my work is always safe in case of any accidental errors. and lastly, i cannot express how grateful i am for the constant support from RIB, whenever i need assistance, they are eager to help and very knowledgeable about the product itself.
cons: Candy currently does not work well with one drive and we've experienced issues where the current working file was saved through a one drive path, but then the next time i wish to use that file, it is then an issue with how it is saved. I generally have no issues when saving to my C drive, however, my company protocol is to work off of onedrive and this causes some additional (unnecessary) work for me. Admittedly the monthly price tag does put off getting an additional license to allow more employees to use this software and if RIB could look at exploring more flexible package options that could suit certain use case, i feel the user base could only increase

review_title: Reliable Estimation Tool for Construction / MEP Industry
description: Candy has completely transformed the way I manage estimation. From accuracy to efficiency, it has taken away the stress of errors and given me full control over costs, resources, comparisons, and project collaboration. It has directly helped me win more projects without post-award issues. Except for the security aspect, I find the software extremely reliable and indispensable for MEP estimation.
author: Abubacker Siddique S.
pros: Since I started using Candy for MEP estimation, the entire way I handle tenders has improved. I’m able to respond to more RFQs, pricing errors are completely eliminated, and the review process during negotiation stages is much more effective. BOQ preparation has become error-free, unit rates are accurate, and labour/manhour allocation for each task is clearly identifiable and adjustable. The quote comparison feature is extremely efficient, and the wide variety of reporting modules makes managing estimates far easier. Overall, the software gave me a real breakthrough in my workflow—I’ve been able to secure a higher volume of projects with confidence that no quantities, BOQ valuations, or material/labour rates are missed. Customer support during implementation and day-to-day use of the software has been excellent. Candy QTO Software is well designed for reviewing drawings and designs, making quantity take-off and tracking much easier.
cons: The main concern I have i, If a colleague resigns and moves to a competitor, it’s very easy to export the master file with all the resource lists and custom worksheets. Since I’ve invested a lot of effort building simple resources and complex worksheets with formulas tailored to specific tasks, there should be more restrictions or security layers to protect this data. With Regards to "Value for Money" i am neutral.

description: It is easy to learn and very user friendly. It has made preparing and reviewing of estimates much easier compared to using the traditional Excel.
author: Mncedisi M.
pros: Quantity takeoff which can is linked to the BOQ. This is helpful especially when there are changes to drawings and design during tender stage. Project collaboration is easy in the sense that handing over the estimate to the project team is seamless. Great customer support - they are always ready to help and more importantly they have solutions for most if not all issues which we raise.
cons: It would be helpful if Candy can be opened in more than one window. This would facilitate and ease comparison between 2 different jobs without having to make one a master.

description: All-in-One Functionality Users praise Candy for its integration of cost estimation, scheduling, forecasting, and reporting functionalities. For example: Estimating Capabilities Importing detailed BOQ (Bill of Quantities) from Excel, plus features like production coding, task packaging, and resourcing libraries, support robust estimating workflows. Handy tools like macros, multiple tender versions, and interactive filtering enhance productivity. Customizable interface and report options boost usability. Supportive Customer Service The support team receives consistent positive feedback for responsiveness.
author: Alexandre M.
pros: I can summarize that different types of professionals (estimators, project managers, surveyors, etc.) tend to like Candy more, since their experiences are incredible.
cons: I can suggest some practical solutions for the missing undo function that we estimators and planners often use in Candy.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My experience over the years is just positive and we find CANDY a very useful tool in construction.
author: Hugo D.
pros: Package is easy to use and gives you control over project. the best tool for estimate creation and then followed by cost tracking. Workflow integration is a great tool to bring all aspects together. Assists with financial reporting and project collaboration.
cons: The only missing UNDO button isa still a dis-like. Other than that, I can't say there is any other not to like.

description: In my opinion, CCS Candy is a professional construction estimating and project control software, and it is much better than manual Excel pricing. The support team is always ready to help and open to any remarks or suggestions for improvement, which they often implement in new versions.
author: Sara E.
pros: Strong organization, secure system all your Data treated as confidential, reliable task tracking, and excellent customer support
cons: Honestly, nothing to dislike—RIB Candy meets expectations in every aspect of use compared to other tools.

description: Satisfied with this software and highly recommended for estimation engineers, cost control engineers.
author: FARHAN H.
pros: Ease of use even multiple projects estimation, cost tracking and workflow integration. So we can say it is highly suggested and value for money. Last but not least the customer support from the team is really appreciable
cons: candy does not incorporate advance capability to formula or function like excel, and it has some unnecessary steps or incapable of doing of shortcut on steps

description: perfect, I'm using candy since 2012, it keep my data base live and could use it in very easy way, and could save a lot of time
author: NAZEM N.
pros: friendly user, provide accuracy and wide problem solutions, database makes the user not repeating the same job, comparison has a lot of options.
cons: networking makes you not always able connect to the team especially when you are in business leave, remote connection is slow

description: My overall experience with RIB Candy has been positive. The system provides strong capabilities for cost estimation, tender management, and project control. It helps improve accuracy, reduce errors, and streamline processes. However, it does require proper training to fully utilize its features.
author: fatimah B.
pros: Enhances bid preparation and margin control Reduces errors in pricing and cost estimation Improves supplier selection and minimizes risks Streamlines payments to suppliers and creditors
cons: What I liked least about RIB Candy is that the system can be a bit complex for new users, and it requires significant training to use it efficiently. In addition, some reports are not very flexible and need manual adjustments.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great user flow. Provides an easy way to manage all projects. I was extremely happy with the accuracy of the data.
author: Thule Z.
pros: Comprehensive and efficient product. Great data insights for all company projects. Easy to use with great user support from RIB.
cons: The only area of improvement is collaboration between users. The current collaboration features are ok but can be improved.

description: Using it since 2016, enhanced my productivity and team collaboration on concurrent time. also using it gives you time to review analyze your pricing for continuous improvement
author: Amr S.
pros: Its not complicated enhance the productivity of estimating and budgeting , it have user friendly interface and considered easy to moderate to learn it
cons: Cost little high , I think this could be enhanced and also some modules can be splited to reconsider the pricing

description: Very convenient and adaptable in construction project
author: prince M.
pros: Very Reliable and easy to use on any project
cons: The unavailability of the undo and scroll features
